titleStmt.title: SII 16.96: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 96. (A.R. No. 56 of 1915.) CHINNA AHŌBALAM, SIRVEL TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: Round the base of the central shrine of the Narasiṁhasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1453, Khara, Māgha śu. 15, corresponding to 1532 A.D., January, 22 (Monday).
It registers gift of lands after purchase to god Ahōbalēśvara by Abbirāju, son of Gubbarāju Tipparāju of Vasiśhṭha-gōtra, Āśvalāyana-sūtra, Ṛik-śākhā and a resident of Pōrumāmiḷḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī . śubhamastu . yētatsurāsurādhīśamauḷiśrēṇivirājitaṁ . Ahōbalanṛśiṁhasya dēvadēvasya śāsanaṁ . dēvaśrēṇiśirōratnaṁ daityadvipaghaṭāṁkuśaṁ . jayatu śrīnāra siṁhvasya dēvadēvasya śāsanaṁ . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1457 Agunēṭi kharasaṁvatsara māgha śu 14 lu śrīmadrājādhirāja paramēśvara śrīvīra pratāpa śrīAcyutadēvamahārāyalu pruthivirājyaṁ sēyucuṁḍaṁgānu svastiśrī catu¨rdaśabhuvanādhīśvarulaina
śrī Ahōbalēśvarulaku vaśiṣṭagōtraṁ Āśvalāyanasūtraṁ ·ṛkhsākhādhyāyulaina pōru māmiḷlapuri gubbarāju tipparājuṁgāri komāruṁḍu Abbirājuṁgāru sama¨rpiṁcina krayabhūdānadha¨rmmaśāsanakramameṭlaṁnanu śrīAhōbalēśvarula diguvatirupati pātṛni cervuguṁṭa tūmukriṁda nārikaḷāla staḷaṁ varimaḍi ma 0Ønu Aṁduku vuttaraṁ vupparamō ḷaku tū¨rpuna varimaḍi ma 0 Ø nu tāme¨rla ceruvuku dakṣiṇamu rāvimāni cēnistaḷaṁ cē
nu kha 0 . nnu śrī Ahōbalēśvarula śrī bhaṁḍārāna krayaṁ goni śrī Ahōbalēśvarulaku sama¨rpiṁcina vivaraṁ yī maḍi maruturulōnuṁnu nārikaḷāla maḍipaṭṭuvaddānu tirunaṁda navanaṁ peṭṭi Ā cātupaḍi perumāḷlaku sama¨rpiṁ[cē Aṭugānunnu] yī tōṁṭavēśina staḷāniki kaḍama varimaḍi [Ādyānu] yī cēnu yēṁdumuṁnnu kaṭṭaḍacēśi sama¨rpiṁstimi gāna vubhayamuṁnnuvarimaḍi marutuluṁnnu varicēnu yēṁdumuṁnnu śrī Ahōbalēśvarula cātupaḍiki [A] The record stops here.
Digital edition of SII 16.96 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
